name: claude-code-cost-tracker
description: Track your Claude Code API costs locally - zero config, privacy-first

claudeCostTracker.useCommunityPricing.markdownDescription: Fetch the community-maintained pricing JSON for non-Anthropic models (GLM, DeepSeek, Kimi, etc). When enabled and `#claudeCostTracker.pricingUrl#` is empty, the built-in community URL is used. Default `false` for privacy.

claudeCostTracker.pricingUrl.markdownDescription: Optional URL to a pricing JSON. Overrides the community URL when set. Format: `{ "<model>": { "input": <usd-per-1M>, "output": ..., "cache_write": ..., "cache_read": ... } }`. Cached locally for 1 hour.

claudeCostTracker.customPricing.markdownDescription: Inline pricing overrides (highest priority). Each entry: `"<model>": { "input": ..., "output": ..., "cache_write": ..., "cache_read": ... }` in USD per 1M tokens.

claudeCostTracker.spikeThresholdUsd.description: Mark assistant turns above this USD cost as spikes.
